title: Data Retention Policy
body:
### Purpose
This policy defines how long customer data is retained after account closure.

### Policy
Customer data is retained for 90 days after account closure. During this period, data remains accessible for audit and regulatory purposes. After 90 days, data is permanently deleted or anonymized unless a legal hold is in place.

### Scope
This policy applies to all customer data stored in production systems, including backups.

title: Acceptable Use Policy
body: Employees must not use company systems for personal gain, illegal activities, or any purpose that violates company ethics. All usage is monitored.

title: Incident Response Procedure
body: In the event of a security incident, follow the IR plan: contain, eradicate, recover. Notify the CISO and legal team immediately.
